title: Claude Fable 5 with Harness Engineering & Loops Will Do Everything.
summary: Cyril Imhof covers Claude Fable 5 and discusses harness engineering, AI loops, and their applications in regulated industries. The video explores tensions between open and closed source AI models, risks of model shutdowns, and the state of AI-powered SaaS, drawing on experience since 2023 in the space.
writeup: Cyril Imhof walks through Claude Fable 5 and the practice of harness engineering, the design of AI loops that drive agentic workflows. The discussion centers on applications in regulated industries and the tensions between open and closed source foundation models, including the risk that a model can be shut down. Imhof also assesses the current state of AI-powered SaaS, drawing on work in the space since 2023.
